title: SessionReceipt

specVersion.description: Semantic version of the SourceOS spec this record conforms to.

sessionRef.description: URN of the AgentSession this receipt summarises.

artifactRefs.description: URNs of artifacts (files, diffs, reports) produced during the session.

decisionRefs.description: URNs of ExecutionDecision records (urn:srcos:exec-decision:<id>) issued during the session.

gateResults.description: Names and outcomes of quality or approval gates evaluated at session close.

capturedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this receipt was created.

description: A summary record produced at the close of an agent session, capturing the final outcome status, artifact references produced, execution decision references, and quality gate results.
